question: How many days a week do I attend fitness classes?

retrieval_results.context:
User follows a mixed fitness routine that includes yoga on Wednesdays, Zumba on Tuesdays and Thursdays at 6:30 pm, and a weightlifting class on Saturdays at 10 am, and wants reminders set for each of these classes as well as reminders to log workouts on their fitness app immediately after each class.
User wants to track progress and set fitness goals, seeking effective methods for doing so.
User is planning to create a new high‑energy playlist for their Zumba classes, featuring Latin‑inspired tracks and upbeat pop anthems for Tuesday and Thursday classes, noting that their instructor Maria enjoys energetic music that gets everyone moving.
User wants tips to stay motivated and consistent in their workout routine.
User is seeking weightlifting-specific playlists for Saturday sessions.
User wants to set specific, measurable goals for each class (Zumba and weightlifting).
User is seeking post-workout stretching exercises.
User wants to incorporate chest opener and shoulder stretches.
User finds chest stretch and shoulder rolls helpful.
User experiences tight shoulders and chest.
